name: Iso11783IL_OPGetVersion
title: Iso11783IL_OPGetVersion
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPGetVersion( dbNode implement, byte extendedVersions ); // form 3
description: The function requests the stored object pools from the Virtual Terminal. A Get Versions command or a Extended Get Versions command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. If a response from the Virtual Terminal is received, the callback function Iso11783IL_OPOnResponse is called.

parameters.name: extendedVersions
parameters.description: kind of versions to query. To get extended versions a VT version 5 or higher is necessary. 0: get standard version strings (7 characters) 1: get extended version strings (32 characters)

parameters.name: implement
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
